name: airtable
description: Reads Airtable bases, tables, records, webhooks, and record comments, and writes record/table/field/comment/webhook mutations, through the Airtable Web API.

risk.read: external Airtable API read of base/table/record metadata
risk.write: external Airtable API mutation of records, table/field schema, comments, and webhooks; schema mutations (create_table/update_table/create_field/update_field) are visible to every base collaborator, approval required
